scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.build:styles: sass theme_components/sass/global-styles.scss:assets/css/global-styles.min.css --style=compressed --no-error-css --charset && sass theme_components/sass/critical-styles.scss:_includes/critical.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --no-error-css --charset && postcss assets/css/global-styles.min.css _includes/critical.min.css --replace && node script/rewrite-critical-urls.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:styles && npm run build:scripts && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.dev: npm run build:styles && npm run build:scripts && (trap 'kill 0' INT; npm run watch:styles & npm run watch:scripts & bundle exec jekyll serve --config _config.yml,_config.dev.yml --livereload --port 4005; wait)
